mapper.sql: id, inventory_id, drug_id, business_type, business_no, change_quantity, quantity_before, quantity_after, operator, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_inventory_log WHERE deleted = 0 AND (business_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR business_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT FROM clinic_inventory_log WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM clinic_inventory_log WHERE inventory_id = #{inventoryId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_inventory_log (inventory_id, drug_id, business_type, business_no, change_quantity, quantity_before, quantity_after, operator, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{inventoryId}, #{drugId}, #{businessType}, #{businessNo}, #{changeQuantity}, #{quantityBefore}, #{quantityAfter}, #{operator}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE clinic_inventory_log SET deleted=1, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
